patch.value: Add --summary mode and unified --format json output for agents

PR #59: adds --summary (one-line-per-change, bracketed text or JSON array), --format md|json as a unified machine-readable alias of --changelog-json, createChangelogSummary()/formatSummaryLine()/ChangelogSummaryEntry exports, and pm extension parity for changelog generate.

--summary prints bracketed one-line entries using the same filtering/grouping as markdown; --summary --format json returns ChangelogSummaryEntry[]; --format json without --summary emits the structured document; invalid --format values exit non-zero in both CLI and pm extension; --suggest-semver --format json keeps the semver-analysis shape; default markdown stays byte-identical
